summary: Motivated and customer-focused professional with experience in front office operations, client communication, and customer service. Skilled in handling inquiries, resolving issues, managing administrative tasks, and supporting daily operations. French native speaker with advanced English, adaptable and committed to delivering high-quality service. Experienced in both retail and corporate environments, with strong communication and problem-solving skills. Based in Kraków, open to opportunities in customer service, front office, administration, hospitality, retail, and call centers.

workExperience.title: Front Office Receptionist
workExperience.description: Full-time front office role managing reception operations and providing exceptional service to visitors and clients.
responsibilities: Welcomed and assisted visitors and clients at the company premises
Managed incoming and outgoing phone calls and handled mail processing
Coordinated with internal departments to ensure proper follow-up of files and requests
Organized appointments, maintained records, and supported administrative operations

workExperience.title: Customer Service Agent
workExperience.description: Part-time customer service role handling client inquiries and improving service delivery.
responsibilities: Handled customer complaints and provided appropriate solutions
Collaborated with internal teams to optimize service delivery times
Promoted new services to improve customer engagement and retention
Updated customer files and ensured accurate follow-up of requests

workExperience.title: Cashier
workExperience.description: Part-time cashier role in a supermarket environment.
responsibilities: Processed customer transactions accurately at the checkout
Assisted customers with product queries and ensured a smooth checkout experience
Maintained a clean and organized checkout area

workExperience.title: Retail Sales Assistant
workExperience.description: Part-time retail sales role focused on customer assistance and product knowledge.
responsibilities: Assisted customers in finding products and making purchasing decisions
Maintained product displays and ensured store presentation standards
Handled customer inquiries and resolved complaints professionally
Supported daily retail operations and stock management

education.degree: High School Diploma, English Language and Literature

notableProjects.title: Retail Management Certification – Alison
notableProjects.description: Completed a certified training program in Retail Management: Merchandising, Sales and Customer Communications. Strengthened skills in organizing and managing in-store operations, merchandising techniques, product presentation, sales strategies, and optimizing the customer shopping experience.

notableProjects.title: Customer Service Excellence Certification – Alison
notableProjects.description: Completed a certified Customer Service training focused on core service skills including call handling, customer satisfaction, problem-solving, and CRM tools. Enhanced adaptability and the ability to respond effectively to customer needs across various service environments.

notableProjects.title: Front Office Operations Improvement – Atrans & Service-NG
notableProjects.description: Streamlined front office workflows by improving appointment scheduling and file-tracking processes, reducing response times for client requests. Acted as the primary point of contact between clients and internal departments, contributing to smoother daily operations over a 1.5-year tenure.
